details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting all core requirements. The export_to_onnx function correctly: (1) exports LoRA adapter A and B matrices from modules, (2) accepts output_dir and opset_version (default 17) parameters, (3) saves comprehensive metadata.json with rank, alpha, target_modules, opset_version, and file listings, (4) is properly exposed on the model class via types.MethodType binding in patch_saving_functions() for both standard and vision models, (5) uses ONNX helper libraries (helper.make_node, make_graph, make_model, numpy_helper.from_array, onnx.save) to build and export valid graphs, and (6) follows unsloth conventions with proper copyright headers, docstrings, error handling, private helper functions, and @torch.inference_mode decorator. The ONNX graph correctly implements the computation (input @ A^T) @ B^T * scaling with proper tensor shape handling. Minor deduction only for the empty PLAN.md artifact, which has no functional impact.
